result.stdout:
Description:
  SQL Server to PlantUML - Generate PlantUML diagrams from SQL Server databases

Usage:
  SqlServer2PlantUml [options]

Options:
  -c, --connection-string <connection-string> (REQUIRED)  SQL Server connection string
  -o, --output <output> (REQUIRED)                        Output file path for the PlantUML diagram
  -t, --type <type>                                       Type of diagram to generate [default: entity]
  -cfg, --config <config>                                 Configuration file path (JSON format)
  --include-schemas <include-schemas>                     Schemas to include (comma-separated)
  --exclude-schemas <exclude-schemas>                     Schemas to exclude (comma-separated)
  --exclude-tables <exclude-tables>                       Table names to exclude (comma-separated, supports wildcards like *temp*, __*)
  --max-tables <max-tables>                               Maximum number of tables to include (0 for unlimited) [default: 0]
  --include-data-types                                    Include column data types in the diagram [default: True]
  --include-relationships                                 Include foreign key relationships in the diagram [default: True]
  --include-indexes                                       Include indexes in the diagram [default: False]
  --theme <theme>                                         PlantUML theme to use
  -v, --verbose                                           Enable verbose logging [default: False]
  --version                                               Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                          Show help and usage information
